books.title: The Hobbit
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: Bilbo Baggins is swept into an epic quest to reclaim a dwarven kingdom from Smaug.
books.notes: A timeless adventure with memorable world-building.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A practical handbook of agile software craftsmanship focused on maintainable code.
books.notes: Revisiting naming, functions, and architecture principles.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A dystopian classic exploring surveillance, authoritarianism, and freedom.
books.notes: Queued for upcoming social-political fiction week.

books.title: Angular Up & Running
books.author: Shyam Seshadri
books.description: A practical guide to building modern web applications with Angular.
books.notes: Great refresher on architecture and component patterns.

books.title: Design Patterns
books.author: Erich Gamma, et al.
books.description: Classic catalog of reusable object-oriented software design patterns.

books.title: The Fellowship of the Ring
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: The first journey in The Lord of the Rings as the Fellowship sets out from Rivendell.
books.notes: Excellent pacing and character setup for the trilogy.

books.title: Refactoring
books.author: Martin Fowler
books.description: Improving existing codebases through disciplined, behavior-preserving transformations.
books.notes: Applying techniques to ongoing Angular code cleanup.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: Epic science fiction on politics, prophecy, and survival on Arrakis.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: Actionable system for building good habits and breaking bad ones.

books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: A lone astronaut wakes up with no memory and must save Earth from extinction.
books.notes: Very readable with strong problem-solving narrative.

books.title: The Psychology of Money
books.author: Morgan Housel
books.description: Behavioral lessons on wealth, investing, and decision-making under uncertainty.
books.notes: Short and practical; excellent mindset framing.

books.title: The Way of Kings
books.author: Brandon Sanderson
books.description: Epic opening to The Stormlight Archive with war, magic, and shattered worlds.

books.title: The Name of the Wind
books.author: Patrick Rothfuss
books.description: The legendary Kvothe recounts his rise from gifted child to infamous wizard.

books.title: Mistborn: The Final Empire
books.author: Brandon Sanderson
books.description: A crew of thieves plots to overthrow an immortal tyrant in an ash-covered world.
books.notes: Excellent pacing and magic system details.

books.title: The Return of the King
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: Final volume of The Lord of the Rings and the climax of Middle-earth's war.

books.title: The Silmarillion
books.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
books.description: Mythic history of Middle-earth from creation through the First Age.

books.title: Foundation
books.author: Isaac Asimov
books.description: A galactic saga guided by psychohistory and civilizational strategy.

books.title: Neuromancer
books.author: William Gibson
books.description: Cyberpunk classic that defined modern visions of cyberspace.

books.title: The Martian
books.author: Andy Weir
books.description: An astronaut stranded on Mars survives through science and grit.
books.notes: Fast-paced and full of clever engineering moments.

books.title: Sapiens
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A sweeping history of humankind from ancient eras to modern systems.

books.title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
books.author: Daniel Kahneman
books.description: Foundational work on two cognitive systems shaping judgment and decision-making.

books.title: Deep Work
books.author: Cal Newport
books.description: A practical case for focused, distraction-free work in a noisy world.
books.notes: Trying the time-blocking approach this month.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt, David Thomas
books.description: Practical principles for writing resilient, adaptable software.

books.title: Clean Architecture
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: Principles and practices for sustainable software architecture.
books.notes: Applying dependency inversion ideas in this project.

books.title: Domain-Driven Design
books.author: Eric Evans
books.description: Strategic and tactical patterns for modeling complex software domains.
books.notes: Focus on bounded contexts and ubiquitous language.

books.title: Effective TypeScript
books.author: Dan Vanderkam
books.description: Best practices for writing robust TypeScript in real-world codebases.
books.notes: Using these tips to tighten app typings.

books.title: The Lean Startup
books.author: Eric Ries
books.description: A framework for product experimentation and validated learning.

books.title: The Midnight Library
books.author: Matt Haig
books.description: A woman explores parallel lives through a mysterious library between worlds.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A shepherd's journey to discover treasure and personal destiny.

books.title: The Road
books.author: Cormac McCarthy
books.description: A bleak, post-apocalyptic journey of a father and son across a ruined landscape.

books.title: Educated
books.author: Tara Westover
books.description: A memoir about education, identity, and self-invention.

books.title: Circe
books.author: Madeline Miller
books.description: A reimagining of the life of Circe from Greek mythology.
books.notes: Heard great things about prose quality.
